name: Vite manualChunks bundle splitting
description: Split framer-motion (44KB gzipped), d3-force (5.6KB gzipped), react-photo-album (2.48KB gzipped) from main bundle using manualChunks in vite.config.ts

name: IntersectionObserver lazy loading
description: Gallery images use IntersectionObserver with 800px rootMargin + native loading='lazy' + decoding='async' for optimal loading performance
